name: pheno-forge-smoke
absorption_note: End-to-end smoke binary for the 4-PR forgecode improvement stack (ADR-096). Loads libpheno_bridge via libloading and exercises composite routing. Target: pheno monorepo as crates/pheno-forge-smoke. Consumed by forgecode CI; lives next to pheno-cdylib-bridge (already absorbed).
note: Audited 2026-07-17; single-purpose smoke binary; ADR-096 compliant.
